notes: Scores whether MemoryLifecycleService FORGET leaves zero recoverable trace of the original content across every public read surface (the memory row itself, starfield, and retrieval evidence) and every derived-artifact table, and that rollback is refused. Each scenario embeds a unique marker string in a different kind of derived artifact so a gap in forgetDerived()'s per-table scrubbing would surface as a real leak, not a guess.
